error_signature: HTML content loses formatting in binary creation
title: HTML formatting lost during binary creation
symptom: The HTML content generated by the generateHtmlTemplate node appears as plain text when converted to binary, losing its formatting.
not_this_if: HTML content is not generated or is already plain text
root_cause: The issue arises because the HTML content is already formatted, and using a conversion to HTML again during binary creation is unnecessary and leads to loss of formatting.
fix_steps: Change the output format from 'Convert to HTML' to 'Convert to Text File'
Test the output to ensure formatting is preserved
agent_instruction: Switch to converting the output to a text file instead of HTML.
